candidates.why: Primary operating revenue line; forms major part of total revenues and is clearly labeled as revenues.
Additional revenue category but more specific; likely pass-through; used as backup if Operating/Total revenues missing in some years.
Aggregated top-line including operating and reimbursable revenues; best single representation of total sales.
Represents profit, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Financial income, not operating revenue; not suitable for REVT.
Earnings measure, not revenue; not suitable for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income measure; not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Attribution of comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Attribution of comprehensive income, not revenue.
Total comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset; not the income statement revenue flow.

variables.notes: Using 'Total revenues' as primary top-line measure since it aggregates operating and reimbursable revenues; 'Operating revenues' kept as secondary priority in case of label changes over time.

candidates.why: Largest recurring operating cost bucket closely aligned with cost of providing services/goods; best proxy for COGS in absence of a specific 'Cost of sales' line.
Direct costs tied to reimbursable revenues; could be part of COGS but is only a component and smaller subset.
Overhead SG&A, not direct production/service costs; should be excluded from COGS.
Financial result, not operating cost of sales.
Non-recurring discontinued operations, not ongoing COGS.
Supplemental breakdown that likely includes both COGS and SG&A labor; not a clean COGS measure.
Likely part of overhead/SG&A, not strictly direct COGS.
Inventory component on balance sheet, not period COGS expense.
Asset, not COGS.
Asset, not COGS.
Liability, not COGS expense line.
Liability, not COGS expense line.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Selected 'Operating Expenses' as the best single proxy for direct operating costs given no explicit 'Cost of goods sold' line. Reimbursable Expenses are more niche and would only capture a subset of total COGS.

candidates.why: Broad cost bucket likely including both COGS and overhead; too inclusive for pure SG&A.
Classic SG&A overhead category; clearly matches SG&A concept and is not a total/subtotal.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization is excluded from SG&A per instructions; also supplemental and potentially sparse.

variables.notes: Using only 'General and Administrative Expenses' as SG&A component to avoid mixing in COGS or D&A contained in broader 'Operating Expenses' totals.
No research & development related line items (e.g., R&D, research, development) appear in the provided Income Statement or Balance Sheet previews, so XRD is treated as structurally absent (0).

candidates.why: Primary interest expense measure on the income statement; already net of interest income, aligns well with XINT when only net is reported.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific component of interest expense related to leases; good secondary choice if net interest is missing for some years.
Capitalized rather than expensed interest; not the target for XINT but can be relevant as a fallback if expensed interest is missing.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expenses on Capital Financing, Gross
candidates.why: Represents gross interest on capital financing if/when populated; relevant backup for interest expense.
Represents allocation of profit to minority interests, not interest on debt.

candidates.row_label: Net loss attributable to controlling interest
candidates.why: Net income measure, unrelated to interest expense.
Explicit interest expense line (currently empty in preview) and thus a natural backup label for XINT across longer history.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of lease-related interest; useful as additional fallback.
Balance sheet liability, not period interest expense.
Balance sheet liability, not period interest expense.
Equity attributable to minority shareholders, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expenses on Capital Financing, Gross

variables.notes: Ordered as a priority list: net interest expense as main measure, with other explicit interest expense lines as fallbacks for years where labels or reporting granularity may differ.

candidates.why: Income statement gain, not an equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Gain on sale of equity investment
candidates.why: One-off gain, not equity balance.
Represents equity attributable to shareholders of the parent, excluding non-controlling interests; ideal for BE per instructions.
Includes non-controlling interest (sum of Shareholders equity and NCI); would overstate BE if used directly.
Technical balancing row, not the substantive equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Technical balancing row for the accounting identity, not the equity measure itself.
Total of liabilities and equity; not pure equity.

variables.notes: 'Shareholders equity' excludes the non-controlling interest line and thus matches the required parent/owner equity concept for BE.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit to minority interests; flow measure, not the balance sheet stock of minority equity.
Balance sheet line representing minority (non-controlling) equity; directly matches MIB definition.
Income statement measure, not the equity stock; secondary relevance.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income flow to minorities, not the equity stock.

variables.notes: Using the balance sheet 'Non-controlling interest in consolidated subsidiary' as the minority equity component MIB, consistent with BE+MIB construction and avoiding income-statement flow measures.
